Now available on iOS

Organise & share
every experience

A private, secure space for the trips, events, and gatherings that matter. Documents, photos, albums, and conversations — all in one place, shared securely with the people you invite.

Download Free Explore features →
What you get

Everything in one place

From planning to memories — Shared Experiences gives you the tools to organise any event and keep everyone in the loop.

🔐

Private Vault

Your own secure document vault with customisable categories. Only you can see it — not even shared participants have access.

🗺️

Events & Experiences

Create itineraries for any occasion — travel, sport, gatherings. Attach documents, assign participants, and track everything in one view.

👥

Address Book

Build a reusable participant address book. Assign people to multiple experiences without re-entering their details.

📄

Document Library

Upload once, reuse across experiences. Boarding passes, hotel confirmations, tickets — organised and always at hand.

📸

Shared Albums

Create albums within an experience and let all participants contribute photos. Your shared memories, together.

💬

Topics & Comments

Start conversations within an experience. Both organisers and participants can post topics and reply — no group chat needed.

Two roles, one app

Pick your role

You choose your role at sign-up. Organisers build and share experiences. Participants join and contribute.

Organiser

You're in charge

  • Build a participant address book for your group
  • Create a shared document library across all experiences
  • Create Events & Experiences (Itineraries)
  • Assign participants and documents to each experience
  • Invite participants — they get secure read access
  • Create albums, photos, topics, and comments for all
  • Your own private vault, visible only to you
Participant

You're invited

  • Accept invitations to Events & Experiences
  • View all documents the Organiser has shared
  • See fellow participants in the experience
  • Add your own albums, photos, topics, and comments
  • Your own private vault, visible only to you
  • Works offline — syncs automatically when connected
See it in action

Built for real adventures

A clean, intuitive interface that gets out of the way — so you can focus on the experience, not the admin.

Home — your experiences at a glance

Hero images bring your events to life

Events list with status and quick stats

Built on Apple infrastructure

Secure by design

Your data never touches our servers. Everything is stored in your personal iCloud account — private, encrypted, and always under your control.

☁️

iCloud Storage

All data lives in your private iCloud database. We never see it.

📵

Works Offline

Full access without a connection. Syncs automatically when back online.

🔒

Secure Sharing

Sharing is authenticated via Apple ID. Only the invited person can access shared data.

📱

Multi-device

Same account, multiple devices. Changes sync in near-real-time across all your Apple devices.

Simple pricing

Start free, grow naturally

Every plan includes secure iCloud storage, offline access, and the full feature set. Upgrade when you need more room.

Personal
Free

Perfect for personal use and getting started.

  • ✓ 5 Experiences
  • ✓ 20 Documents
  • ✓ 10 Participants
  • ✓ 10 Private Vault documents
  • ✓ iCloud sync & offline access
  • ✕ Sharing with participants
